---
title: "Testing"
author: "Beth Babcock"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r,eval=TRUE}
# Calculate power across all scenarios in TestSetup
# Assumes fishTotal exists and includes: Season, Site, Density, logDensity, Number, Presence

TestSetupPower <- TestSetup %>%
  mutate(
    power = pmap_dbl(list(Variable, PercentChange, n_after, delta_CV, Season, Distribution, Test),
                     function(Variable, PercentChange, n_after, delta_CV, Season, Distribution, Test) {

                       dat_season <- fishTotal %>% filter(.data$Season == Season)

                       # baseline mean on original scale for the variable
                       baseline_mean <- mean(dat_season[[Variable]], na.rm = TRUE)

                       # within-site SD depends on scale used in test
                       # - for logDensity we use sd of logDensity directly (normal)
                       # - for Density we use sd of log(Density + logAdd) because we plan percent change on log scale below
                       # - for Number and Presence we use appropriate transformed columns if needed
                       logAdd <- 1e-5

                       # Summarize baseline to get within-site SD etc.
                       # For normal/logDensity: logTransform=FALSE because variable is already log-transformed
                       # For Density: logTransform=TRUE so sd_within is on log(Density+logAdd) scale
                       sum_base <- if (Variable == "logDensity") {
                         summarize_baseline(dat_season,
                                            siteVar = "Site",
                                            responseVar = "logDensity",
                                            groupVar = NULL,
                                            logTransform = FALSE,
                                            logAdd = 0)
                       } else if (Variable == "Density") {
                         summarize_baseline(dat_season,
                                            siteVar = "Site",
                                            responseVar = "Density",
                                            groupVar = NULL,
                                            logTransform = TRUE,
                                            logAdd = logAdd)
                       } else if (Variable == "Number") {
                         # keep on original count scale for the simulation functions
                         summarize_baseline(dat_season,
                                            siteVar = "Site",
                                            responseVar = "Number",
                                            groupVar = NULL,
                                            logTransform = FALSE,
                                            logAdd = 0)
                       } else { # Presence
                         summarize_baseline(dat_season,
                                            siteVar = "Site",
                                            responseVar = "Presence",
                                            groupVar = NULL,
                                            logTransform = FALSE,
                                            logAdd = 0)
                       }

                       sd_w <- if (Variable == "Density") sum_base$logsd_within else sum_base$sd_within

                       # Translate delta_CV into sd_d (between-site SD of true changes) on the delta scale
                       # - For normal/logDensity: delta is an additive change on that scale
                       # - For Density percent-change on log(y+logAdd): delta is log(after+add)-log(before+add)
                       # - For Number: we'll treat delta as log ratio for NB simulation (see below)
                       # - For Presence: we'll treat delta as logit shift for binomial simulation (see below)
                       if (Variable == "logDensity") {
                         delta_target <- log(1 + PercentChange / 100)   # interpret percent change as multiplicative on original density
                         sd_d <- abs(delta_target) * delta_CV
                         use_delta_for_power <- delta_target
                         return(power_for_n_after(
                           S = 16, nB = 10, nA = n_after,
                           delta = use_delta_for_power,
                           sd_w = sd_w, sd_d = sd_d,
                           alpha = 0.05, nsim = 2000, seed = 1,
                           distribution = "normal",
                           useTest = "paired-t"
                         ))
                       }

                       if (Variable == "Density") {
                         # Use analytical percent-change function on log(y+logAdd) scale with paired t-test
                         # Derive sd_d on the delta (log) scale
                         delta_target <- log(baseline_mean * (1 + PercentChange / 100) + logAdd) -
                           log(baseline_mean + logAdd)
                         sd_d <- abs(delta_target) * delta_CV
                         return(power_for_percent_change(
                           percent_change = PercentChange,
                           baseline_mean = baseline_mean,
                           nA = n_after, S = 16, nB = 10,
                           sd_within = sd_w,
                           sd_delta = sd_d,
                           alpha = 0.05,
                           logTransform = TRUE,
                           logAdd = logAdd
                         ))
                       }

                       if (Variable == "Number") {
                         # Negative binomial simulation:
                         # delta is applied as a log-multiplicative shift in the simulation code (true_change added to log(mu))
                         nbinom_mu <- baseline_mean
                         nbinom_disp <- 1  # placeholder; adjust based on your system / estimates
                         delta_target <- log(1 + PercentChange / 100)
                         sd_d <- abs(delta_target) * delta_CV

                         return(power_for_n_after(
                           S = 16, nB = 10, nA = n_after,
                           delta = delta_target,
                           sd_w = sd_w, sd_d = sd_d,
                           alpha = 0.05, nsim = 2000, seed = 1,
                           distribution = "nbinom",
                           useTest = "paired-t",
                           nbinom_mu = nbinom_mu,
                           nbinom_disp = nbinom_disp
                         ))
                       }

                       # Presence: binomial simulation
                       binomial_prob <- mean(dat_season$Presence, na.rm = TRUE)
                       binomial_size <- 1
                       delta_target <- qlogis(pmin(pmax(binomial_prob * (1 + PercentChange / 100), 1e-6), 1 - 1e-6)) -
                         qlogis(pmin(pmax(binomial_prob, 1e-6), 1 - 1e-6))
                       sd_d <- abs(delta_target) * delta_CV

                       # Choose test: prop.test if requested, else paired-t on proportions
                       useTest <- if (Test == "prop.test") "prop.test" else "paired-t"

                       power_for_n_after(
                         S = 16, nB = 10, nA = n_after,
                         delta = delta_target,
                         sd_w = sd_w, sd_d = sd_d,
                         alpha = 0.05, nsim = 2000, seed = 1,
                         distribution = "binomial",
                         useTest = useTest,
                         binomial_size = binomial_size,
                         binomial_prob = binomial_prob
                       )
                     })
  )

TestSetupPower
```

```{r}
# Plot results
ggplot(TestSetupPower,
       aes(x = n_after, y = power,
           color = factor(PercentChange),
           group = interaction(PercentChange, delta_CV))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1.2) +
  facet_grid(Variable + Season ~ delta_CV,
             labeller = labeller(delta_CV = function(x) paste0("delta_CV=", x))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Power across scenario grid",
    subtitle = "Facets: Variable + Season by delta_CV; colors show percent change",
    x = "After samples per site (n_after)",
    y = "Estimated power",
    color = "Percent change"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
